name: GST Elution Buffer

notes.en: Prepare fresh; reduced glutathione oxidizes quickly. Add NaCl 150 mM to improve elution from Glutathione Sepharose. Adjust pH to 8.0. Eluted fractions contain free GSH — remove by dialysis_buffer_generic before downstream assays. Higher GSH (15–50 mM) can increase yield.
notes.zh: 需新鲜配制，还原型谷胱甘肽易氧化。可加 150 mM NaCl 提高洗脱效率。pH 调至 8.0。洗脱液含游离 GSH，下游分析敏感时需透析（dialysis_buffer_generic）去除。提高 GSH 浓度至 15–50 mM 可增加产量。

ref: GE Healthcare Glutathione Sepharose 4B Instruction 71-5027-67; Harper & Speicher (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 6.6.1
